title: The Life and Music of Giuseppe Verdi
writer: Leonardo Benvenuti, Liana Ferri, Maleno Malenotti
actors: Pierre Cressoy, Anna Maria Ferrero, Gaby André
plot: The life and loves of great composer Giuseppe Verdi are played against a background of the great operas of the 19th Century. A tender love story of his successful and turbulent life, with more than 20 excerpts from his acclaimed o...
